hvac-filter-change.name: HVAC filter change
hvac-filter-change.consequencesOfSkipping: Reduced airflow, higher utility bills, dust complaints from guests, premature HVAC failure.

ac-tune-up.name: AC tune-up (pro)
ac-tune-up.consequencesOfSkipping: Mid-summer breakdown during peak booking window. Loss of one weekend ≈ $800–2000 revenue.

smoke-detector-test.name: Smoke + CO detector test
smoke-detector-test.consequencesOfSkipping: Liability exposure, code violation, worst-case life safety.

deep-clean.name: Deep clean (between long stays)
deep-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Cleanliness reviews drop. Below 4.7 average and you lose Superhost.

gutter-clean.name: Gutter cleaning
gutter-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Ice dams in cold climates, foundation water damage, soffit rot.

chimney-sweep.name: Chimney sweep
chimney-sweep.consequencesOfSkipping: Creosote fire risk. Insurance won't cover damage if maintenance log is empty.

dryer-vent-clean.name: Dryer vent cleaning
dryer-vent-clean.consequencesOfSkipping: Major fire hazard (~3000 home fires/year per FEMA). Dryer takes 2–3 cycles to dry one load.

pressure-wash-deck.name: Pressure-wash deck / siding
pressure-wash-deck.consequencesOfSkipping: Algae buildup, deck-board rot, curb-appeal hits in listing photos.

water-heater-flush.name: Water heater flush
water-heater-flush.consequencesOfSkipping: Sediment buildup → reduced capacity → shorter showers → guest complaints.

fire-extinguisher-check.name: Fire extinguisher inspection
fire-extinguisher-check.consequencesOfSkipping: Code violation. Liability if expired during incident.
